feature.name: Device Bound Session Credentials
feature.creator: kristianm@chromium.org
feature.summary: To enhance user security and combat session cookie theft, Chrome is introducing [Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC)](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/web-platform/device-bound-session-credentials). This feature allows websites to bind a user's session to their specific device, which makes it significantly more difficult for stolen session cookies to be used on other machines.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2023-05-25 by kristianm@chromium.org). To enhance user security and combat session cookie theft, Chrome is introducing [Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC)](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/web-platform/device-bound-session-credentials). This feature allows websites to bind a user's session to their specific device, which makes it significantly more difficult for stolen session cookies to be used on other machines. Category: Security. Blink component: Blink. Stars: 173.

adoption.finding: The legacy HTML/JS counter 'DeviceBoundSessionRegistered' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 5328) measured 0.0362% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2025-04-12 with 457 data points. Mapping confidence: exact.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures this feature directly but may include pre-existing usage.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
